name: agent-hub-vscode
description: Run cloud or local coding agents through Agent Hub from VS Code.

chatParticipants.name: agenthub
chatParticipants.description: Run cloud or local workspace agents

commands.name: agent
commands.description: Inspect or change the current workspace

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain the current selection or file

commands.name: research
commands.description: Research the web with local synthesis

agentHub.pythonPath.description: Python executable used to start Agent-Hub. Use auto to try workspace .venv, Python Launcher, python, and python3 until a Python 3.11+ runtime is found.

agentHub.configPath.description: Path to Agent-Hub config, relative to the workspace root unless absolute.

agentHub.route.description: Default Agent-Hub route used by VS Code commands.

agentHub.researchRoute.description: Agent-Hub route used by the Research Web command.

agentHub.codingAgentRoute.description: Agent-Hub route used when provider mode is local.

agentHub.agentProviderMode.description: Control agent provider mode. Cloud uses the configured cloud-agent route, hybrid tries that route then local fallbacks, and local uses direct LM Studio/Ollama routes.

agentHub.agentMaxSteps.description: Maximum tool steps for agent requests.

agentHub.agentContextBudgetTokens.description: Input-token budget for compacting long Agent Hub workspace-agent histories.

agentHub.agentContextCompactionEnabled.description: Compact old Agent Hub tool results before model calls to reduce context growth.

agentHub.agentMode.description: Workspace agent mode. Standard agent uses one routed model loop; group-agent coordinates planner, researcher, coder, reviewer, fixer, and finalizer roles.

agentHub.groupPlanCandidates.description: Number of planner candidates to ask in group-agent mode.

agentHub.allowShellTools.description: Allow the coding agent command to run shell commands in the workspace.

agentHub.maxTokens.description: Maximum output tokens for VS Code agent requests.

agentHub.autoStart.description: Start the local Agent-Hub server automatically when sending a request and the server is offline.
